title: calylophus berlandieri subsp. pinifolius
intro: Calylophus berlandieri subsp. pinifolius is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae, commonly known as the pine-leaved Mexican primrose. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calylophus berlandieri subsp. pinifolius include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
